# DF(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  df — report disk space usage

## SYNOPSIS
  df [-h]

## DESCRIPTION
Shows filesystem disk usage for all mounted partitions.

## OPTIONS
  -h  human-readable sizes (K, M, G)

## EXAMPLES
  df -h
  df

## SEE ALSO
  du, free, mount
